message:
Command `# Check Yosys CPU more carefully
ps -p 216314 -o pid,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime,stat,comm 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Also check memory usage - large designs can use a lot
free -h` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Check Yosys CPU more carefully
ps -p 216314 -o pid,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime,stat,comm 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Also check memory usage - large designs can use a lot
free -h", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

               total        used        free      shared  buff/cache   available

Swap:             0B          0B          0B

extras.command:
# Check Yosys CPU more carefully
ps -p 216314 -o pid,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime,stat,comm 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Also check memory usage - large designs can use a lot
free -h
